title: to부정사 (형용사/부사 역할)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 형용사/부사 역할을 하는 to부정사구를 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 그 역할을 (형용사/부사)로 표시한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: I have something important to tell you.

answer.analysis: I have something important [to tell you].

problems.stem: She went to the store to buy some milk.

answer.analysis: She went to the store [to buy some milk].
answer.translation: 그녀는 [우유를 좀 사기 위해서] 가게에 갔다.

problems.stem: He was happy to see his family again.

answer.analysis: He was happy [to see his family again].

problems.stem: This water is not safe to drink.

answer.analysis: This water is not safe [to drink].

problems.stem: We need a plan to solve this problem.

answer.analysis: We need a plan [to solve this problem].

problems.stem: I woke up to find myself famous.

answer.analysis: I woke up [to find myself famous].
answer.translation: 나는 잠에서 깨어 [유명해진 나 자신을 발견했다].

problems.stem: He must be a genius to answer that question.

answer.analysis: He must be a genius [to answer that question].

problems.stem: There is no chair to sit on.

answer.analysis: There is no chair [to sit on].

problems.stem: She is studying hard to pass the exam.

answer.analysis: She is studying hard [to pass the exam].
answer.translation: 그녀는 시험에 [합격하기 위해서] 열심히 공부하고 있
